description: Combines multiple step annotations at a position, showing how multiple previous steps merge or combine. Requires at least two step references with optional label text and styling.
utility: Mark where multiple steps combine into a single result

arguments.name: position
arguments.description: Position of the combined step, specified as at(row, col)

arguments.name: label
arguments.description: Optional label text for the combined step

arguments.name: style
arguments.description: Optional styling modifiers (c for color, s() for style, dash, fadeout, etc.)

examples.expression: astep_1 = annotationstep(at(1,1), size(2), "1"), astep_2 = annotationstep(at(2,1), size(2), "2"), stepcombine(at(3,1), astep_1, astep_2)
astep_1 = annotationstep(at(1,1), size(2), "1"), astep_2 = annotationstep(at(2,1), size(2), "2"), stepcombine(at(3,1), astep_1, astep_2, "sum")

examples.scenario: Combine two trig substitution steps with plus operator and result label
examples.expression:
astep_1 = annotationstep(at(4,12), size(11.8), "1")
astep_2 = annotationstep(at(9,22), size(4.7), "1")
scomb_1 = stepcombine(at(3,37), astep_1, "+", astep_2, "text(result)")
